techcrunch.title: Startup Battlefield 200 applications close today: Nominate a founder or submit your startup
techcrunch.summary: Today is the final day to apply or nominate a startup for Startup Battlefield 200. Once the clock strikes 11:59 p.m. PT, the window closes on your chance to compete for $100,000 in equity-free funding, gain global visibility, connect directly with investors, and launch on the TechCrunch Disrupt stage.

techcrunch.title: ElevenLabs’s new music generation model can switch genres mid-track
techcrunch.summary: ElevenLabs' new model will let users regenerate a section of a song without affecting rest of the track

techcrunch.title: SOND, a sleep tech startup from Bose’s former head of sleep, exits stealth with $7M
techcrunch.summary: SOND, a startup led by Bose’s former head of sleep products, emerged from stealth with $7M in funding for its AI-powered sleep earbuds.

techcrunch.title: TechCrunch Disrupt 2026 Early Bird ticket savings end in 3 days
techcrunch.summary: There are only 3 days left to save up to $410 on your ticket to TechCrunch Disrupt 2026. Early Bird pricing ends May 29 at 11:59 p.m. PT, and once the deadline passes, ticket prices increase. If you plan to attend one of the most influential gatherings in tech this year, now is the time to lock in your pass before rates go up again.

techcrunch.title: China is increasingly keeping its best AI talent to itself
techcrunch.summary: China's AI boom is producing world-class talent, and Beijing is increasingly reluctant to let them go elsewhere.

techcrunch.title: ClickHouse triples anualized revenue to $250M, charting a path toward an IPO
techcrunch.summary: The database provider is eyeing a public debut within the next few years.

techcrunch.title: YouTube will now automatically label AI videos
techcrunch.summary: YouTube will now automatically label videos that use significant photorealistic AI, instead of relying solely on creators to disclose AI-generated content themselves. It's also making AI labels more prominent.

techcrunch.title: Robinhood now lets your AI agents trade stocks
techcrunch.summary: Robinhood will let users create a separate account with pre-loaded balance that an agent use to trade

techcrunch.title: Tech CEOs are apparently suffering from AI psychosis
techcrunch.summary: "CEOs are uniquely prone to AI psychosis," Box CEO Aaron Levie opines. Maybe that explains the almost religious belief in AI productivity gains.

techcrunch.title: DuckDuckGo installs are up 30% as users reject being ‘force-fed’ Google’s AI Search
techcrunch.summary: Google overhauled Search at I/O 2026, replacing blue links with AI agents. The backlash has been swift. DuckDuckGo app installs spiked 30% as users seek a way out.
